title: Explosive Deaths
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8235b5a9fef6d540a7869a8ba70cf0d86b21ce51.png)
# **Mod Description**

Explosive Deaths is a Forge mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that causes all mobs to explode when they die. Whether it's a chicken or a creeper, once they hit the ground (or your sword), they leave behind a blast — turning peaceful meadows and mob farms into explosive hazards.



## Features:
- Mobs explode on death, this excludes players.
